rag_rules: AGREE assume/guarantee expressions must evaluate to boolean type; align helper declarations with expression types
Resolve all references to variables like 'altitudeFromGround' before use in contracts
generic_rules: In AGREE contracts, ensure type consistency between expressions and their expected types
Validate that all referenced identifiers are properly declared and visible in scope
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use 'eq' for boolean expressions in AGREE contracts; ensure comparisons are between compatible types
Place component type contracts in component type scopes, not implementation scopes
anti_patterns: Do not place implementation-level bindings in component type scopes
Avoid using subcomponent ports directly in component type contracts
irrelevant_topics: AGREE validator diagnostics related to annex placement
